description: How active customers discover and activate additional modules or bundles from inside the product. Self-serve by default.

surfaces.description: Cards on the main dashboard surfacing recommendation rule matches.
Marketplace view filterable by outcome, persona, blueprint, and price.
In-app prompts triggered by specific events (e.g. a missed call lands while module is inactive).
Next recommended bundle per vertical blueprint's suggested_bundle_order.

activation_paths.instant: Entitlement created, capabilities present, module goes live immediately.
activation_paths.guided: Entitlement created, 1–3 prerequisites missing — short wizard completes setup.
activation_paths.assisted: Complex dependency triggers a concierge offer; optional paid setup.
